name: Heroic Challenger - Clasp Sword
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｈ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒロイック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>チャレンジャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> クラスプ・ナイフ
desc: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Heroic Challenger" monster: You can add 1 "Heroic Challenger" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use the effect of "Heroic Challenger - Clasp Sword" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Heroic Challenger" monster: You can add 1 "Heroic Challenger" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use the effect of "Heroic Challenger - Clasp Sword" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Heroic Challenger" monster: You can add 1 "Heroic Challenger" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use the effect of "Heroic Challenger - Clasp Sword" once per turn.
